ham.subject: Your Weekly Deals Inside – Save Big on Your Next Purchase!
ham.body:
Hi there,

Welcome to this week’s exclusive deals! Here’s what we’ve lined up for you:

• 20% off on all electronics – grab the latest gadgets.
• Buy 1 get 1 free on selected fashion items.
• Free shipping on orders above ₹999.

Don’t miss out – these offers are valid till Sunday. Click <URL> to explore and shop now.

Thank you for being a valued customer!

Cheers,
Your Friends at TrendyMart

spam.subject: FedEx Delivery Fee Due – Act Now!
spam.body:
Hello,

We have noticed that your FedEx shipment was not delivered due to an unpaid delivery fee. To avoid any delay or return of your package, please settle the outstanding fee within the next 24 hours.

Click <URL> to view the invoice and pay securely.

Thank you for choosing FedEx. We appreciate your prompt attention to this matter.

Best regards,
FedEx Customer Support
